projectDescription: A lightweight, Docker-ready REST API for generating static map images with markers, polygons, circles, polylines, and text overlays.
keyFeatures: Generate static map images via REST API (GET and POST)
Supports multiple basemaps: OpenStreetMap, Esri, Stamen, Carto, custom tile servers
Overlay markers, circles, polylines, polygons, and text on maps
Output formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, PDF
Built-in tile and image caching for performance
Rate limiting per IP to protect against abuse
Interactive playground UI at root URL
publicApiSurface: GET /api/staticmaps - Generate a static map image
POST /api/staticmaps - Generate a static map image (body parameters)
Parameters: center, zoom, width, height, format, basemap, tileUrl, markers, circle, polyline, polygon, text, border, attribution
Basemaps: osm, otm, streets, satellite, hybrid, topo, gray, hillshade, national-geographic, stamen-toner, stamen-watercolor, carto-light, carto-dark
Auth: x-api-key header or API_KEY query parameter
